things.name: Basra Old City & Corniche
things.description: Historic waterways and Corniche promenade along the Shatt al-Arab waterway

things.name: Basra Museum
things.description: Former Uday Hussein palace converted to a museum of Basra's history and culture

things.name: Sinbad Island
things.description: Island in the Shatt al-Arab, legendary home of Sinbad the Sailor of Arabian Nights fame

things.name: Corniche Hotel Clock Tower
things.description: Landmark of the Basra waterfront, the social heart of the city

things.name: Central Basra Souq
things.description: Traditional market with spices, gold, textiles and the famous Basra dates

things.name: Basra International Port
things.description: Iraq's only major seaport - a historically significant Persian Gulf trading hub

things.name: Imam Ali Shrine (Najaf)
things.description: Day trip to Najaf, site of the most important Shia shrine in the world

things.name: Iraqi Marshlands (Ahwar)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Garden of Eden marshlands with Marsh Arab culture

things.name: Basra University Campus
things.description: Sprawling university campus with a botanical garden on the city outskirts

things.name: Abu Al-Khasib Date Palm Groves
things.description: Iraq's finest date palm orchards producing the world-famous Basra dates
